channel.title: Mozilla Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Mozilla Corporation (mozilla).

item.title: CVE-2026-57963 — Chat UI manipulation by injection
item.description: An attacker who can send HTML chat messages (via Matrix or XMPP) can inject arbitrary styled content, phishing links, and CSS that manipulates the chat UI. This vulnerability was fixed in Thunderbird 152.0.1 and Thunderbird 140.12.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-57962 — Denial-of-service via malicious LDAP address-book server
item.description: A malicious LDAP server, which a Thunderbird user is configured to query for address-book autocomplete, can stash arbitrarily large amounts of attacker-supplied data into the Thunderbird LDAP client until it crashes due to memory exhaustion. This vul…

item.title: CVE-2026-53899 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Cross-origin cookies could be leaked when opening a PDF link
item.description: Firefox for iOS used partial domain matching when attaching cookies to PDF requests, allowing a malicious site on a suffix domain to receive cookies belonging to the target site. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox for iOS 152.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-12330 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Incorrect boundary conditions in the Internationalization component
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Internationalization component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox ESR 140.12, Firefox ESR 115.37, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.title: CVE-2026-12329 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory safety bug fixed in Thunderbird ESR 140.12
item.description: Memory safety bug fixed in Thunderbird ESR 140.12. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox ESR 140.12 and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.title: CVE-2026-12328 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox ESR 115.37, Firefox ESR 140.12, Thunderbird ESR 140.12, Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox ESR 115.36, Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird ESR 140.11, Firefox 151 and Thunderbird 151. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have bee…

item.title: CVE-2026-12327 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox ESR 140.12, Thunderbird ESR 140.12, Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird ESR 140.11, Firefox 151 and Thunderbird 151. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run a…

item.title: CVE-2026-12326 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 151 and Thunderbird 151. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed…

item.title: CVE-2026-12325 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Denial-of-service in the Graphics: ImageLib component
item.description: Denial-of-service in the Graphics: ImageLib component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Firefox ESR 115.37, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.title: CVE-2026-12324 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: CanvasWebGL component
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: CanvasWebGL component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.title: CVE-2026-12323 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Spoofing issue in the DOM: Core & HTML component
item.description: Spoofing issue in the DOM: Core & HTML component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152.

item.title: CVE-2026-12322 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Clickjacking issue in the Widget: Gtk component
item.description: Clickjacking issue in the Widget: Gtk component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152.

item.title: CVE-2026-12321 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript: WebAssembly component
item.description: JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript: WebAssembly component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152.

item.title: CVE-2026-12320 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Information disclosure in the Password Manager component
item.description: Information disclosure in the Password Manager component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152.

item.title: CVE-2026-12319 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Denial-of-service in the Audio/Video: Playback component
item.description: Denial-of-service in the Audio/Video: Playback component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152.

item.title: CVE-2026-12318 — Incorrect boundary conditions in the Libraries component in NSS
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Libraries component in NSS. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152.

item.title: CVE-2026-12317 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory safety bug fixed in Firefox 152
item.description: Memory safety bug fixed in Firefox 152. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152.

item.title: CVE-2026-12316 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Mitigation bypass in the DOM: Security component
item.description: Mitigation bypass in the DOM: Security component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152.

item.title: CVE-2026-12315 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Mitigation bypass in the DOM: Security component
item.description: Mitigation bypass in the DOM: Security component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.description: Memory safety bug fixed in Firefox 152. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.description: Information disclosure, sandbox escape in the Security: Process Sandboxing component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.description: Memory safety bug fixed in Firefox 152. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.description: Information disclosure, sandbox escape in the Security: Process Sandboxing component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.description: Memory safety bug fixed in Firefox 152. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.description: Memory safety bug fixed in Firefox 152. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.title: CVE-2026-12304 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Same-origin policy bypass in the Networking: Cookies component
item.description: Same-origin policy bypass in the Networking: Cookies component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.title: CVE-2026-12303 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Information disclosure due to incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: WebGPU component
item.description: Information disclosure due to incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: WebGPU component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152.

item.description: Mitigation bypass in the DOM: Security component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Firefox ESR 115.37, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.description: Memory safety bug fixed in Firefox 152. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152.

item.description: JIT miscompilation in the DOM: Core & HTML component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Firefox ESR 115.37, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.description: Memory safety bug fixed in Firefox 152. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.title: CVE-2026-12297 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Sandbox escape due to incorrect boundary conditions in the Networking component
item.description: Sandbox escape due to incorrect boundary conditions in the Networking component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Firefox ESR 115.37, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.description: Sandbox escape in the Security: Process Sandboxing component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.description: Sandbox escape in the DOM: Navigation component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Firefox ESR 115.37, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.description: Sandbox escape in the DOM: Workers component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Firefox ESR 115.37, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.description: Use-after-free in the Graphics: WebGPU component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152.

item.title: CVE-2026-12292 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Incorrect boundary conditions in the Web Audio component
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Web Audio component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.description: Use-after-free in the Networking: HTTP component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Firefox ESR 115.37, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.description: Memory safety bug fixed in Firefox 152. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Firefox ESR 115.37, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.title: CVE-2026-12289 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Privilege escalation in the Graphics: WebRender component
item.description: Privilege escalation in the Graphics: WebRender component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Firefox ESR 115.37, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.title: CVE-2026-11799 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — UXSS in Focus for iOS / Klar Webkit navigation
item.description: UXSS in Focus for iOS / Klar Webkit navigation. This vulnerability was fixed in Focus for iOS 151.3.1 and Klar for iOS 151.3.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-10702 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript Engine: JIT component
item.description: JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript Engine: JIT component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151.0.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-10701 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: Text component
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: Text component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151.0.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-9309 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Arbitrary JavaScript execution in internal pages via Reader View JSON-LD injection
item.description: Firefox for iOS Reader View did not properly escape HTML tags in JSON-LD metadata. A malicious page could inject markup that changed Reader View behavior and leaked sensitive URL parameters. These parameters could then be used to access internal page…

item.title: CVE-2026-9308 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Arbitrary JavaScript execution in Reader View due to wrong HTML replacement order
item.description: Firefox for iOS Reader View replaced page content in its HTML template before replacing other internal placeholders. A malicious page could include a placeholder string that was later substituted with JSON-LD data, potentially resulting in arbitrary…
